name: privacy-pools-cli
description: CLI for interacting with Privacy Pools v1

scripts.test: node scripts/run-bun-tests.mjs ./test/unit ./test/integration ./test/fuzz ./test/services --exclude ./test/integration/cli.packaged-smoke.integration.test.ts --exclude ./test/integration/cli-built-entrypoint.integration.test.ts --exclude ./test/services/contracts.service.test.ts --exclude ./test/services/proofs.service.test.ts --exclude ./test/services/workflow.mocked.service.test.ts --exclude ./test/unit/flow-handlers.unit.test.ts --exclude ./test/unit/account-handler-errors.unit.test.ts && node scripts/run-bun-tests.mjs ./test/services/contracts.service.test.ts --timeout 120000 && node scripts/run-bun-tests.mjs ./test/services/proofs.service.test.ts --timeout 120000 && node scripts/run-bun-tests.mjs ./test/services/workflow.mocked.service.test.ts --timeout 120000 && node scripts/run-bun-tests.mjs ./test/unit/flow-handlers.unit.test.ts --timeout 120000 && node scripts/run-bun-tests.mjs ./test/unit/account-handler-errors.unit.test.ts --timeout 120000 && node scripts/run-bun-tests.mjs ./test/integration/cli-built-entrypoint.integration.test.ts --timeout 240000
scripts.test:ci: npm test && npm run test:smoke && npm run test:coverage && npm run test:e2e:anvil:smoke && node scripts/run-bun-tests.mjs ./test/evals --timeout 120000 && bun run build && node scripts/generate-reference.mjs --check && node scripts/run-conformance-suite.mjs core
scripts.test:release: npm test && npm run test:smoke && npm run test:coverage && npm run test:e2e:anvil && node scripts/run-bun-tests.mjs ./test/evals --timeout 120000 && bun run build && node scripts/generate-reference.mjs --check && node scripts/run-conformance-suite.mjs core
scripts.test:all: npm test && npm run test:smoke && npm run test:coverage && npm run test:e2e:anvil && node scripts/run-bun-tests.mjs ./test/evals --timeout 120000 && bun run build && node scripts/generate-reference.mjs --check && node scripts/run-conformance-suite.mjs all
scripts.test:conformance: bun run build && node scripts/run-conformance-suite.mjs core
scripts.test:conformance:all: bun run build && node scripts/run-conformance-suite.mjs all
scripts.test:conformance:frontend: bun run build && node scripts/run-conformance-suite.mjs frontend

author: matthewb
